decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of spells and abilities from the Izzet color combination. The deck focuses on being able to manipulate the board state, draw cards, and deal damage while also having some flexibility in dealing with the opponent's threats. By using various talents, techniques, and abilities, the player can outsmart their opponent and maintain the upper hand in the game. The deck also includes some powerful creatures and planeswalkers to help secure victory in the end.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramp. By utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se, Earthbender Ascension, and Fecund Greenshell, the deck aims to establish early dominance on the battlefield. With cards like Escape Tunnel and Glimpse the Core providing additional card advantage and resource flexibility, the deck can maintain pressure and tempo throughout the game. The inclusion of combat tricks like Archdruid's Charm and Mightform Harmonizer further boosts the deck's ability to push for lethal damage and secure victories.

The main theme of this deck is centered around building a strong mono green aggro strategy. With a focus on efficient mana production and powerful creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently. By utilizing cards that enhance creature strength and provide additional mana sources, the deck is able to maintain a fast and aggressive playstyle. Cards like Ba Sing Se and Badgermole Cub help establish early board presence, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Earthbender Ascension provide additional power and resilience to the deck's creatures.

The deck focuses on quick and aggressive plays, utilizing cards that allow for card draw, manipulation, and direct damage. The key strategy is to quickly build a board presence with creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, while also using spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the opponent's board and deal damage. With a mix of creature buffs, card advantage, and tempo plays, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and finish the game swiftly before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressively using Azorius creatures and spells to control the board while pressuring the opponent's life total. By utilizing cards like Aven Interrupter, Aang Swift Savior, and Floodpits Drowner, the deck aims to establish an early board presence and maintain tempo throughout the game. Additional support cards like Three Steps Ahead and Voice of Victory provide card advantage and combat tricks to help secure victory. The deck is well-rounded with a mix of creatures, removal, and protection spells to deal with various threats and capitalize on opportunities.

The main idea of this deck is to control the opponent's board and hand through a combination of removal spells and card draw. By using cards like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while accumulating card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent. The inclusion of Agna Qel'a and It'll Quench Ya! helps to provide additional control options, while Monument to Endurance and Multiversal Passage offer utility and protection. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining control of the game and outvaluing the opponent through tactical decision-making.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using various spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain board control. It includes a mix of card draw, removal, and counter spells to outlast the opponent and secure victory. The key strategy is to systematically dismantle the opponent's resources while building up your own defenses and eventually overwhelm them with powerful threat cards. This deck excels at manipulating the battlefield and forcing the opponent to play on your terms.

The main concept of this Jeskai Control deck is to use a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to control the game and outvalue your opponent. By utilizing cards like Jeskai Revelation, Lightning Helix, and Stock Up, you can generate card advantage and maintain control of the board. Spells like Spell Snare and Day of Judgment help to deal with threats from your opponent, while cards like Rest in Peace can disrupt graveyard strategies. The deck aims to dictate the pace of the game and win through incremental advantage.

This Dimir Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays using cards like Floodpits Drowner, Deep-Cavern Bat, and Tishana's Tidebinder to quickly overwhelm opponents. It also utilizes disruptive spells like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff to control the board and protect its creatures. The deck includes some card draw and mana fixing to ensure a smooth curve of aggression. Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Spyglass Siren provide additional utility and support to keep up the pressure on opponents. The deck aims to win quickly by overwhelming opponents with its aggressive creatures and disruption.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures and utilize powerful dragons to overwhelm your opponent. By using cards like Twinmaw Stormbrood, Nova Hellkite, and Magmatic Hellkite, you can deal massive damage to your opponent while also having protection with cards like Cavern of Souls and Voice of Victory. Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant can also help power up your dragons, providing additional pressure on your opponent. With a mix of fast creatures and potent dragons, this Boros Aggro deck aims to swiftly defeat your opponent before they have a chance to react.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creature plays. Tifa Lockhart, Sazh's Chocobo, and Bristly Bill, Spine Sower are key creatures that can help push damage through. The deck also includes mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, allowing for faster plays. Snakeskin Veil provides protection for key creatures, while Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer offer additional power boosts. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and secure a quick victory through aggressive plays.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays using efficient creatures like Ba Sing Se, Badgermole Cub, and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also utilizes mana ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to quickly deploy threats. Other cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help to boost the power of your creatures. Escape Tunnel and Royal Treatment provide additional ways to protect your key creatures. The overall strategy is to build a strong board presence early and maintain pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on establishing an aggressive board presence by utilizing creatures like Llanowar Elves and Icetill Explorer to ramp up mana quickly. Ba Sing Se and Earthbender Ascension provide powerful buffs to your creatures, while cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Vibrance help to further strengthen your board. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help ensure mana fixing and consistency, while Full Bore and Shared Roots provide additional utility. With a mix of land ramp, creature buffs, and efficient creatures, this Gruul Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with speed and power.

The main focus of this Temur Control deck is to control the game through a combination of card advantage, counterspells, and removal spells. By using cards like Burst Lightning, Spell Snare, and Stock Up, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards a powerful late-game. The deck also utilizes card draw and ramp effects to ensure it can hit its land drops and cast its higher cost spells. With a mix of control elements and card advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and eventually win through superior resources and threats.

The main concept of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly swarm the board with low-cost creatures and use land ramp spells to accelerate mana production. The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to ramp into larger threats like Mossborn Hydra and Earthbender Ascension. In addition, Escape Tunnel and Shared Roots provide additional ways to generate mana and clean out opponent?s creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and efficient creature-based strategy while maintaining a solid mana base for consistent plays.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub to cast powerful cards like Aang, Swift Savior and Appa, Steadfast Guardian. Utilizing cards like Airbender Ascension and Interdimensional Web Watch, the deck aims to control the board and overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence. Additionally, cards like Seam Rip and Starting Town provide utility and support for the combo potential of the Bant Airbending archetype. With a mix of aggression and control, this deck aims to dominate the battlefield and secure victory.
